case_title: PAULINE BARTOLONE VS. REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-16-2010 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR AND DISSOLVED. (212) PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-22-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-07-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

BEN ROSENFELD, ESQ., APPEARED SPECIALLY FOR PLAINTIFF. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUL-25-2011 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NO OBJECTION BY COUNSEL APPEARING SPECIALLY FOR PLAINTIFF. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-25-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Ben Rosenfeld, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. No objection by counsel appearing specially for Plaintiff.
Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-23-2011 Continued To Jul-25-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 7/25/2011 at 1:30 PM, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2011 Continued To May-23-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Ben Rosenfeld, Esq. appearing specially for the plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 5/23/2011 at 1:30 PM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Feb-22-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Pauline Bartolone, appearing on her own behalf. The OSC is ordered off calendar and dissolved. Proceedings not reported. (212)
